sql_array: CREATE TABLE geometries (id INT, geom GEOMETRY, name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO geometries (id, geom, name) VALUES (1, st_point(1, 1), 'Point A'), (2, st_point(2, 2), 'Point B'), (3, NULL, 'Point C');
SELECT id, isgeometry(geom) <> 1 AS is_not_geometry FROM geometries WHERE geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*), isgeometry(geom) FROM geometries GROUP BY isgeometry(geom) HAVING isgeometry(geom) <> 1;
SELECT g1.id, g2.name FROM geometries g1 JOIN geometries g2 ON g1.id <> g2.id AND isgeometry(g1.geom) = 1 WHERE g2.geom IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, name FROM geometries WHERE isgeometry(geom) = 1 AND (id IS NULL OR id <> 0);
SELECT id, AVG(ST_X(geom)) OVER (PARTITION BY isgeometry(geom)) AS avg_x FROM geometries WHERE isgeometry(geom) = 1;
SELECT name FROM geometries WHERE isgeometry(geom) <> 1 AND geom IS NOT NULL ORDER BY id;
WITH geom_check AS (SELECT id, isgeometry(geom) AS check_geom FROM geometries) SELECT MAX(id) FROM geom_check WHERE check_geom = 1;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_geometries (val FLOAT, description VARCHAR(100));
INSERT INTO temp_geometries (val, description) VALUES (1.5, 'Description A'), (ST_X(NULL), 'Description B');
SELECT t.val, isgeometry(NULL) <> 1 AS is_geometry_check FROM temp_geometries t WHERE t.val > 0.5;
